title: Spontex Twist Mop Refill | Washable Microfibre Mop Head | Cleans Laminate, Wood & Tile Flooring | for Spontex Twist and Twist Ultra Compact Mops
features: MICROFIBRE MOP HEAD: For use with the Spontex Twist and Twist Ultra Compact mops
SUITABLE FOR MOST TYPES OF FLOORS: Including tiles, laminate and wood
BACTERIA BUSTING: Microfibre cloth mop head removes 99% of bacteria with just water*, thanks to tight loops that effectively catch dirt
FOR EVERY TYPE OF MESS: White fluffy mop head picks up dirt and hair and is ideal for dusting when used dry
EASY MAINTENANCE: 100% microfibre cloth mop head features tight loops that effectively catch dirt and is hand-washable
description: Product Description Ultra absorbent and efficient, Spontex Twist Mop Refill has an integrated non scratch scourer pad to tackle tough marks and stains, without damaging your floors. It can be used on all types of floors including tiles, laminate and wood. And did you know, the micro fiber refill is made up of thousands of tiny fibers, so the number of contact points with the surface is greater than a standard mop, effectively retaining more dirt and dust. You can also use it without chemicals, reducing detergent consumption and helping you do your bit for the environment. Spontex develops and markets a full range of consumer driven products in the household cleaning category. Their range of clever cleaning products includes cloths, scourers, gloves and mops, all designed to make everyday tasks better, quicker and easier. Manufacturer Contact Information Mapa Spontex UK Ltd., Berkeley Business Park, Worcester, WR4 9ZS, UK.
